title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed code editor now supports local AI models via LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp integration, allowing developers to run coding assistants on-machine for privacy and reduced cloud dependency. The editor supports models like Gemma-4 12B and Qwen-3.6, with features for code explanation, refactoring, and boilerplate generation.
